---
title: "‘Wind-flower Leaves: May.’ Signed C.M. Yonge."
---

## ‘Wind-flower Leaves: May.’ Signed C.M. Yonge.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1901
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Friendly Leaves</i> (May 1901) 171-3.

### Notes

This series, \'Leaves for the Months\', some of which are unsigned, is attributed to CMY in her obituary in <i>Friendly Leaves</i> (April 1901).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
